hypoxia_modality: 0.5% O2 hypoxia versus 21% O2 normoxia for 16 h
notes: Independent GEO-deposited full Cuffdiff-like table. GEO metadata states biological triplicates for each condition; source sample_1 is wt_norm and sample_2 is wt_hypo, so the effect column is already hypoxia-vs-normoxia.
Workbook has a full Cuffdiff-style DEG table, but GEO sample metadata exposes a single 387 normoxia and single 387 hypoxia sample for this direct contrast, below the locked >=3 per-arm S0 criterion.

Workbook reports a large contrast table with p/q values, but the normoxia and hypoxia columns correspond to different culture days rather than >=3 biological replicates at a single matched duration; not strict S0 evidence.
GEO workbook has miRNA and mRNA count matrices with three normoxia and three hypoxia columns, but no contrast-level LFC plus p/FDR fields.

Direct oxygen comparison with three samples per arm and FDR/effect columns, but the deposited table has only 2,683 rows and appears significant/top-hit-scale rather than full/near-full tested gene universe.
Workbook sheet name mentions DESeq2 results, but inspected columns are gene annotations and per-sample counts only; no as-deposited LFC plus p/FDR contrast columns.

paper_or_dataset: GSE279434 human aortic endothelial sustained hypoxia
notes: FTP listing exposes per-sample TSV files and RAW tar only; no full as-published or GEO-deposited contrast-level DEG table was found in the supplementary listing.

The report has a large fold-change/p-value table, but the named comparison confounds genotype/status with oxygen condition (control/normoxia versus Sox17iDeltaEC/hypoxia), so it is not direct hypoxia-vs-normoxia evidence.
